## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content audit & fixes prioritized: Team to focus on completing link audit and manual content fixes through next Wednesday, deprioritizing new content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Performance metrics stable: Views in consistent range, sessions increasing. Google remains primary traffic source with high NGate sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Messaging updates pending: Galileo team to provide updated messaging doc soon, considering recent product launches and events.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding & Team Updates

  - [Jackson (Galileo): Completed 1-week onboarding, now focusing on product knowledge, messaging, and campaign work.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Conor (Galileo): At Databricks office, meeting with Marcel and Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)

### Content Delivery & Publishing

  - [Recent deliveries: Several articles and two FAQ blogs completed last week.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Publishing process: Can publish to staging immediately; production publishing limited to Jackson and Conor for now.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Jen plans to publish blogs on Tuesday for LinkedIn carousel content.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Performance Report

  - [Views: All-time high last week, now in a consistent range.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Sessions: Continuing to increase.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Traffic sources:](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [Google remains primary referrer.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [High percentage of NGate sessions from Google and other sources.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [LLM referral traffic increased (2nd highest ever).](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [Reviewing performance of recently published clusters (CICD, multi-agent, multimodal AI).](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Investigating lag in AI security content.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [Assessing older articles (Oct-Nov 2022) for potential updates or repurposing.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### Content Strategy & Priorities

  - [Contributor's Guide: Jackson to work on this next week to scale reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Review process: Increased focus on reviews starting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [FAQ blogs: Program continuation dependent on performance of initial posts.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Older articles: Retain for traffic, potentially realign or use for cross-promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Link audit:](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [Halfway complete; easy fixes done.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [Manual review needed for images, code snippets, and formatting issues.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [Team to prioritize completion over new content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

### Messaging & Communication

  - [Galileo team to provide updated messaging doc considering recent launches (agent liability) and events (Databricks AI Summit).](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Jackson to set expectations with team on edit processes and SME knowledge incorporation.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

  - [Pivot to increased content reviews starting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9TBynzmjiuAozEcsPo1M-e6DTnxzM5k-?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
